glosses.ro: a fi atent; a avea grijă
glosses.ja: 気をつける; 世話をする

translations.en: I have to be careful in traffic.
translations.es: Tengo que tener cuidado en el tráfico.
translations.fr: Je dois faire attention dans la circulation.
translations.ru: Мне нужно быть осторожнее на дороге.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que ter cuidado no trânsito.
translations.vi: Tôi phải cẩn thận khi tham gia giao thông.
translations.ar: يجب أن أكون حذرًا في المرور.
translations.nl: Ik moet goed uitkijken in het verkeer.
translations.hi: मुझे ट्रैफिक में सावधान रहना है.
translations.nb: Jeg må være forsiktig i trafikken.
translations.id: Saya harus berhati-hati di lalu lintas.
translations.sv: Jag måste vara försiktig i trafiken.
translations.ro: Trebuie să fiu atent în trafic.
translations.da: Jeg skal passe på i trafikken.
translations.ja: 道路では気をつけないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present tense 1st person singular agreeing with 'Ich'; selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition (contraction of 'in' + 'dem'); forms a locative PP and governs dative.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as object of 'im' in the locative PP.
Separable verb used as bare infinitive complement of the modal 'muss'; intransitive here with a locative PP ('im Verkehr').

translations.en: He wants to pay attention in class.
translations.es: Él quiere prestar atención en clase.
translations.fr: Il veut être attentif en classe.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想在课堂上认真听讲。
translations.ru: Он хочет быть внимательным на уроке.
translations.pt: Ele quer prestar atenção na aula.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn tập trung trong lớp.
translations.ar: هو يريد أن ينتبه في الصف.
translations.nl: Hij wil goed opletten in de les.
translations.uk: Він хоче бути уважним на уроці.
translations.hi: वह कक्षा में ध्यान देना चाहता है.
translations.nb: Han vil følge med i timen.
translations.sv: Han vill vara uppmärksam på lektionen.
translations.ro: El vrea să fie atent la ore.
translations.da: Han vil følge med i timen.
translations.ja: 彼は授業に集中したい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense 3rd person singular; expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition (contraction of 'in' + 'dem'); locative, governs dative.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as complement of 'im'.
Separable verb in bare infinitive as complement of 'will'; intransitive here with a locative PP ('im Unterricht').

sentences.target: Wir sollten auf die Katze aufpassen.

translations.de: Wir sollten auf die Katze aufpassen.
translations.en: We should look after the cat.
translations.fr: Nous devrions nous occuper du chat.
translations.vi: Chúng ta nên trông con mèo.
translations.nl: We moeten op de kat passen.
translations.hi: हमें बिल्ली का ध्यान रखना चाहिए.
translations.sv: Vi borde ta hand om katten.
translations.ro: Ar trebui să avem grijă de pisică.
translations.cs: Měli bychom se postarat o kočku.
translations.ja: 私たちは猫の世話をしたほうがいい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, past/irrealis form used for suggestion ('should'); agrees with 1st person plural and selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition governed by the verb 'aufpassen' in the pattern 'aufpassen auf + ACC'; introduces the prepositional object and takes accusative.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Katze'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as object of the preposition 'auf' (prepositional object of 'aufpassen').
Separable verb in bare infinitive as complement of 'sollten'; used transitively with 'auf + ACC' marking the entity watched.

sentences.target: Sie muss mit dem heißen Öl aufpassen.
sentences.reading: /ziː mʊs mɪt deːm ˈhaɪ̯sən øːl ˈaʊ̯fpasn/

translations.de: Sie muss mit dem heißen Öl aufpassen.
translations.ipa: /ziː mʊs mɪt deːm ˈhaɪ̯sən øːl ˈaʊ̯fpasn/
translations.en: She has to be careful with the hot oil.
translations.es: Ella tiene que tener cuidado con el aceite caliente.
translations.fr: Elle doit faire attention avec l'huile chaude.
translations.it: Lei deve fare attenzione con l'olio caldo.
translations.ru: Ей нужно быть осторожной с горячим маслом.
translations.pt: Ela tem que tomar cuidado com o óleo quente.
translations.he: היא צריכה להיזהר עם השמן החם.
translations.vi: Cô ấy phải cẩn thận với dầu nóng.
translations.ar: عليها أن تحذر من الزيت الساخن.
translations.nl: Ze moet voorzichtig zijn met de hete olie.
translations.uk: Їй треба бути обережною з гарячою олією.
translations.hu: Óvatosnak kell lennie a forró olajjal.
translations.hi: उसे गरम तेल से सावधान रहना है.
translations.pl: Ona musi uważać z gorącym olejem.
translations.el: Πρέπει να προσέχει με το καυτό λάδι.
translations.nb: Hun må være forsiktig med den varme oljen.
translations.id: Dia harus berhati-hati dengan minyak panas.
translations.sv: Hon måste vara försiktig med den heta oljan.
translations.ro: Ea trebuie să fie atentă cu uleiul fierbinte.
translations.cs: Musí být opatrná s horkým olejem.
translations.da: Hun skal være forsigtig med den varme olie.
translations.fi: Hänen täytyy olla varovainen kuuman öljyn kanssa.
translations.ja: 彼女は熱い油に気をつけないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary, present tense 3rd person singular; selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition meaning 'with', governs dative; introduces an instrumental/associative PP.
Definite article, dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Öl' under 'mit'.
Attributive adjective, dative neuter singular (-en inflection) modifying 'Öl' after a definite article.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as complement of 'mit'.
Separable verb in bare infinitive as complement of 'muss'; here used intransitively with 'mit + DAT' indicating the thing requiring caution.
